scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix resource-service && npm install --prefix notification-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n auth,resource,notification,frontend -c blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix resource-service" "npm run dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
